overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered urban market with industrial architecture and prominent neon signage. The player approaches a food stall, observes the vendor working, then moves through an open plaza area toward a seating area with two individuals.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with industrial food stalls

events.description: approaching food stall with distinctive zebra-patterned partition wall
slowing down as reaching the stall counter area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market corridor approaching a food stall vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter preparing items

entered.detail: tall partition wall with black and white diagonal stripes separating stall sections
industrial metal shelves with various items stored along the corridor wall
wooden counter with food preparation items and containers
two-story building with prominent teal neon PHARMACEUTICALS signage

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow covered market corridor with industrial metal architecture. The camera approaches a food stall marked by a distinctive zebra-patterned partition wall, where a vendor stands behind the counter. Teal neon signage for a pharmaceuticals store is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior looking out to open plaza

events.description: strong sunlight streams through roof gaps creating dramatic god rays and volumetric lighting
pedestrians walk through the background plaza area

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter observing the vendor and watching activity in the plaza ahead

notable_agents.action: vendor working at the stall, handling items on the counter

entered.detail: pink neon sign with pizza slice icon mounted on distant building
industrial metal stairs leading to upper level of the pharmaceuticals building

segments.scene_description: Positioned at the food stall counter in a semi-covered market area with dramatic volumetric sunlight streaming through the industrial roof. The vendor works at the counter while the camera pans to observe the pharmaceuticals building across the open plaza, marked by teal neon signage and a pink pizza sign visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza in front of pharmaceuticals building

events.description: moving away from the stall into the open plaza area with scattered cardboard debris
turning left toward the seating area while passing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking away from the food stall through the open plaza toward a seating area

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the plaza

entered.detail: scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the concrete ground
industrial metal bridge structure spanning above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza area away from the food stall, revealing the full facade of the pharmaceuticals building with its teal neon signage. The ground is littered with cardboard debris under an industrial overhead walkway. The camera turns left toward a seating area while pedestrians cross the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area with metal table under overhead structure

events.description: approaching metal table where two individuals are seated
moving into shadowed area beneath the overhead industrial structure

agents.ego_description: approaching a seating table where two individuals are resting

notable_agents.action: person in bright neon yellow shirt sitting at the table with a bottle
person slumped over the table appearing unconscious or asleep

entered.detail: long metal table with bottles and glasses where two people are seated
metal safety railing along the edge of the seating area

segments.scene_description: Approaching a metal seating table under the shadow of an overhead industrial structure. Two individuals occupy the table—one wearing a bright neon yellow shirt sitting upright with a bottle, the other slumped over the surface. The pharmaceuticals building remains visible in the background across the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, industrial market corridor into a wide, sun-drenched urban plaza. It begins by advancing through a covered walkway of metal architecture toward a food stall with a zebra-patterned partition, while teal neon signage glows in the distance. As the camera reaches the counter, the scene opens up to reveal dramatic volumetric sunlight streaming through the roof, shifting the view toward a pharmaceuticals building and a pink pizza sign across an open square. The camera then moves away from the stall and across the debris-strewn plaza, passing under an industrial overhead walkway as pedestrians cross the path. Finally, the movement turns left to approach a metal seating table in the shadows, where one person in a neon yellow shirt sits upright beside another slumped over the surface.
